meta.title: Priority Is In The Eye Of The Asset Owner
meta.description:
Danielle helped run a critical infrastructure prioritization exercise with water utilities to rank operational technology cyber scenarios and critical entities at H2oSecCon last fall. The exercise methodology had 2 key purposes:

1. to help asset owners choose and prioritize the right OT scenario to prepare for and run TTX on, and 
2. to provide a standardized priority score, which can be used by government and industry stakeholders to compare entities, locations, facilities, or sites within any jurisdiction (by geography, sector, regulatory body, etc.).

After a brief overview of the methodology, Danielle will present the results from the exercise.
